mapper.select: SELECT sip.amount FROM shop_items si INNER JOIN shop_item_prices sip ON sip.shop_item_id = si.id AND sip.currency = 'ACTIVITY_POINTS' AND sip.unit_type = #{unitType} AND (sip.valid_from IS NULL OR sip.valid_from <= NOW(3)) AND (sip.valid_to IS NULL OR sip.valid_to >= NOW(3)) WHERE si.item_code = #{itemCode} AND si.enabled = 1 ORDER BY sip.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: p.shop_item_id = si.id AND p.currency = 'ACTIVITY_POINTS' AND (p.valid_from IS NULL OR p.valid_from <= NOW(3)) AND (p.valid_to IS NULL OR p.valid_to >= NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT si.item_code AS itemCode, si.shop_category AS shopCategory, si.redeem_mode AS redeemMode, si.display_label AS displayLabel, si.sort_order AS sortOrder, si.consumable_kind AS consumableKind, si.client_row_id AS clientRowId, (SELECT p.amount FROM shop_item_prices p WHERE ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS priceAmount, (SELECT p.currency FROM shop_item_prices p WHERE ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS currency, (SELECT p.unit_type FROM shop_item_prices p WHERE ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS unitType FROM shop_items si WHERE si.enabled = 1 ORDER BY si.sort_order ASC, si.id ASC
